Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1083 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 5 18 303 0}Now, listen closely. A true man should always carry the fiery soul of a samurai within them![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1083 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 5 19 303 0}Our school curriculum nurtures the samurai spirit within our students so that they contribute to society...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 5 20 14 0}Oh là là! How wonderful! I wish to set my soul on fire and learn the ways of the great samurai also![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1083 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 5 21 303 0}That's what I like to hear, my boy! Though you hail from a foreign land, the samurai spirit burns within you all the same![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1083 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 5 22 303 0}Yes... And in that very moment, Lord Masamune's eye was, without a doubt, brimming with tears.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 5 23 14 0}A fascinating story! It brings eyes to my tears![n]{f 1 1}
